description: CompositionPrinted black shorts made of recycled polyester, has a wide waistband, drawstrings on the outside with metal eyelets and a velcro closure, one pocket on the thigh with embroidered brandingFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry cleanDo not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron directly on print/embroideryReferencing beach lifestyle, reminiscent of the sun, sand and surf, this pair of shorts from quiksilver is tailored to be worn low on the hips. The busy print is balanced with a minimal, fuss-free cut. Wear this with a monochrome tee in shades of green or blue. Model statisticsThe product is size 32, length 24" on a model of height 6' and waist 32”
